diagrams.title: Normal Form Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows progression from 1NF to BCNF with each form eliminating specific dependencies
diagrams.purpose: Understanding progression and requirements of each normal form

diagrams.title: Functional Dependency Types
diagrams.description: Visual representation of partial, transitive, and full functional dependencies
elements: X→Y: Full functional dependency (when X is entire key)
X→Y: Partial dependency (when X is part of composite key)
X→Y→Z: Transitive dependency (X determines Y, Y determines Z)
diagrams.purpose: Identifying dependency types to determine normal form violations

diagrams.title: Normalization Process Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process to normalize a relation
elements: Apply BCNF: Ensure all determinants are superkeys
Test: Lossless join and dependency preservation
diagrams.purpose: Guide for normalizing database relations systematically
